Title: Start broker service
Steps: 1) Launch Narada. 2) Navigate to broker control screen. 3) Tap Start.
ExpectedResult: Broker status shows Running; logs show server start; no error banners.

Title: Stop broker service
Steps: 1) With broker running, tap Stop. 2) Wait for state update.
ExpectedResult: Broker status shows Stopped; logs show server stop; port released.

Title: Client connects to broker
Steps: 1) Start Narada broker. 2) In Mahati, create connection to Narada IP/port. 3) Connect.
ExpectedResult: Narada client count increments; log entry for connect; Mahati shows connected.

Title: Publish/subscribe loopback
Steps: 1) Start broker. 2) In Mahati subscribe to home/test. 3) Publish message to home/test.
ExpectedResult: Broker logs publish; Mahati receives message in correct chat.

Title: Broker logs stream
Steps: 1) Start broker. 2) Connect and disconnect a client. 3) Open logs.
ExpectedResult: Logs contain connection and disconnection entries in order.

Title: Broker stability with multiple clients
Steps: 1) Start broker. 2) Connect two Mahati clients with different IDs. 3) Subscribe both to home/multi. 4) Publish from each.
ExpectedResult: Broker logs both clients; both clients receive messages; no crash.

Title: Restart broker while clients connected
Steps: 1) Start broker. 2) Connect a client. 3) Stop and restart broker.
ExpectedResult: Client disconnects then can reconnect; broker logs clean stop/start.

Title: Invalid port handling
Steps: 1) Open settings. 2) Set broker port <1024 or non-numeric.
ExpectedResult: Validation error or rejection; broker does not start with invalid port.

Title: Auth enabled with wrong credentials
Steps: 1) Enable auth with username/password. 2) Connect Mahati with wrong credentials.
ExpectedResult: Connection refused; broker logs auth failure.

Title: WebSocket mode (if enabled)
Steps: 1) Enable WS and set WS port/path. 2) Start broker. 3) Connect client using WS.
ExpectedResult: Connection succeeds; publish/subscribe works.

Title: Retained message handling
Steps: 1) Publish retained message to home/retained. 2) New client subscribes to home/retained.
ExpectedResult: Client receives retained message immediately after subscribe.

Title: Create new connection
Steps: 1) Open Mahati. 2) Add connection with host/port/clientID. 3) Save.
ExpectedResult: Connection appears in list with correct details.

Title: Connect/disconnect
Steps: 1) Tap connection to connect. 2) Verify connected state. 3) Disconnect.
ExpectedResult: UI reflects correct state transitions without errors.

Title: Subscribe to topic
Steps: 1) Open topic subscriptions for a connection. 2) Add topic home/alpha with QoS 1.
ExpectedResult: Topic appears in subscribed list; no error snackbar.

Title: Open chat for subscribed topic
Steps: 1) Tap home/alpha in subscriptions.
ExpectedResult: Chat opens for home/alpha; only that topic’s messages shown.

Title: Publish message from chat
Steps: 1) Open chat for home/alpha. 2) Type message and send.
ExpectedResult: Message appears as sent; recipient receives it; no duplicates elsewhere.

Title: Receive message routing
Steps: 1) Subscribe to home/alpha and home/beta. 2) Publish to each topic.
ExpectedResult: Each chat shows only its topic’s messages; no cross-pollination.

Title: Notification deep link
Steps: 1) Put app in background. 2) Receive message on home/alpha. 3) Tap notification.
ExpectedResult: App opens directly to home/alpha chat with correct connection.

Title: Wildcard + filter
Steps: 1) Subscribe to home/+/status. 2) Publish to home/kitchen/status and home/living/status.
ExpectedResult: Both messages appear in wildcard chat; unrelated topics do not.

Title: Wildcard # filter
Steps: 1) Subscribe to home/#. 2) Publish to home/a, home/a/b, home/x/y/z.
ExpectedResult: All are shown in wildcard chat.

Title: Multiple notifications routing
Steps: 1) Receive notifications for home/a and home/b. 2) Tap each notification.
ExpectedResult: Each opens its correct chat; not the last received topic.

Title: Topic with slashes in notification
Steps: 1) Receive message on home/a/b/c. 2) Tap notification.
ExpectedResult: Navigates to home/a/b/c chat; full topic preserved.

Title: Topic prefix handling
Steps: 1) Set topic prefix in connection config. 2) Subscribe to alpha. 3) Publish to prefixed topic.
ExpectedResult: UI shows alpha messages; routing correct.

Title: Offline publish failure
Steps: 1) Disconnect client. 2) Attempt to send message.
ExpectedResult: UI shows send failure; message not marked sent.

Title: Reconnect auto-subscribe
Steps: 1) Subscribe to home/alpha. 2) Disconnect and reconnect.
ExpectedResult: Subscription persists; receives messages after reconnect.

Title: Unsubscribe flow
Steps: 1) Unsubscribe from home/alpha. 2) Publish to home/alpha.
ExpectedResult: No new messages arrive; subscription removed from list.
